title: Collapsing Skies
description:
A vanilla-flavored expansion of the Deep Dark that adds more structures, and a reason to go looking for them.

[CURRENTLY IN ALPHA]
body:
This mod adds two new major structures to the deep dark biome, plus a few small ones. These structures have unique modded loot which can be used to craft a new sword.

Alpha Version:

Added the altar, citadel, meteorite and miscellaneous platform structures

Added loot tables for chests in the altar, citadel, platforms, and minor modifications made to ancient city loot tables

Added 6 new advancements

New blocks: Meteorite Block, Darklight Core, Extinguished Darklight Core, Nebulous Sculk, Starsilver Ore
New tools: Skybreaker (sword), Soulbinder (hoe)

New items: Starsilver Shard, Starsilver Fragment, Spirit Fragment, Blade Fragments - Upper, Middle, Lower, Stardust Signet

TL;DR, a small deep dark expansion for people tired of going into the biome and not finding anything. There's a lot more in the works for the beta version, but for now, it's just a minor addition.
